attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
WART.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY           
,WART.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,WART.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,WART.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID               
,WART.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,WART.BK_GL_TRX_FSCL_CAL_CD         
,WART.BK_GL_TRX_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT     
,WART.BK_GL_TRX_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT    
,WART.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,WART.SK_LINE_REF_NUM  
,WART.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT /*FLEXI CHANGE Q1FY23*/  
,WART.DV_BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY            
,WART.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD           
,WART.GL_DT                         
,WART.ACCRUAL_TRX_QTY               
,WART.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE             
,WART.GL_POSTED_DT                  
,WART.SS_CD                         
,WART.POB_TYPE_CD                   
,WART.OFFR_ATTR_ID_INT              
,WART.ATTRIBUTION_CD                
,WART.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
,WART.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT      
,WART.ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT        
,WART.TSV_TRXL_AMT                  
,WART.REV_RECOG_FLG                 
,WART.SK_ORIGINAL_LINE_REF_NUM      
,WART.SEQUENCE_ID                   
,WART.OFFR_ATTR_PCT                 
,WART.BUSINESS_APPLICATION_NAME     
,WART.ACCT_CLASS_CD                 
,WART.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT        
,WART.RU_CDT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
,WART.RU_DBT_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
,WART.RU_CREDIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT      
,WART.RU_CREDIT_TRXL_AMT            
,WART.RU_DEBIT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT       
,WART.RU_DEBIT_TRXL_AMT        
,WART.FUTURE_BILLING_PROCESS_FLG     
,WART.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,WART.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,WART.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,WART.EDW_UPDATE_USER     
,WART.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD     
,WART.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME/*ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA Q2FY21*/ 
,WART.PARTNER_HARDWARE_REV_FLG /*ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA Q2FY21*/
,WART.TIME_BOUND_CRDT_APLD_FLG  /* Added for PA credit Q2FY21 DEC*/
,WART.FLEXUP_RESV_TRANS_FLG /*Added as part of Q1FY22 Athena sep release */
FROM $$WORKDB.W_ACCRUED_REV_TRX WART 
WHERE DML_TYPE = 'I' 
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT WART.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ACCRUED_REV_TRX NART 
WHERE NART.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY =  WART.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY )
